title: Middle East proxy and deterrence escalation
description: Regional escalation risk linking Iran, Israel, Saudi Arabia, and the United States during 2024.

scenario.question: Could proxy escalation and deterrence failures push Iran, Israel, Saudi Arabia and the United States into a broader regional crisis in 2024?

historical_signals: The case is meant to preserve proxy escalation and direct-strike tails in the same distribution.
Regional spillover should dominate negotiated de-escalation in the initial horizon.
